entry.title: Hello! to all members of community
entry.content:
Being a member of this SAP community is very grateful, firstly introduce myself.
I Ronit Bhavsar and currently working in SAP Financial Accounting in Daffodils Info Knowledge Solution, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.
Excited to gain & share knowledge as much as I can.
 SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: Re: Transport Request import ended with RC=8, But able to...
entry.content:
Hi Dolores,

Yes, there is an entry for the TOC in SolMan system in table /TMWFLOW/TRORD_N.

But when I try to delete the entry through report /TMWFLOW/TRANSPORT_DELETE couldn't delete this ToC entry. Looks like this report is for to delete Transport Request, but not for TOC.


Is there any other way to delete it.

Thanks in advance for your support.

Regards

Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: Cannot update Picklist after updating source document
entry.content:
Hi,

I ve got SP2505 on SAP Business One v10.0.

What is wierd, that i ve tried it again yesterday, the same process, PATCH on the same Order and PUT on the same Picklist and request was successful which is totaly messed up, because i dont know what was wrong and now it looks like, that everything works fine.

Thanks and have a nice day.

entry.title: How to Enable Mass Data Upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have created a Custom Business Object (CBO) in SAP Public Cloud, using an Employee data table as an example. I have also added a custom catalog extension, and the CBO tile currently allows adding only one entry at a time. However, I need to enable mass data upload functionality directly within the CBO, without relying on external tools.

Could anyone share suggestions or step-by-step guidance on how to implement mass data upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud? Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC Copy Data Action is not working
entry.content: I can think of any reason why it's not working ,  maybe you can try to specify accounts and measures in copy step filter and test again. And also check the data action log if there is any records been generated with the execution.

entry.title: Visibility disappear from process Build
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am practicing following "Boost your Business Process with Automation, Decision and Process Visibility | SAP Tutorials". In chapter “Create Process Visibility Scenario | SAP Tutorials”, there is tab Visibility in attribution of process as below picture.

But in my trial system, I cannot find the same tab and replaced by tab attributes. Who knows where I can find the  Visibility.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: VIEW Plugin Deployed to CF, but Not Visible in POD De...
entry.content:
Hello,

I would recommend to use the new mechanism to import custom POD plugin directly in the POD designer. You can find the details in the help .

It's easier as you don't have to deal with MTA and CF. And also, it takes only some seconds to deploy.

You can find useful examples in the SAP DM Example GitHub repository

I hope it helps.

BR,

Emilien

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
Hi @ste_herrmie so you managed to install and run 2023 FPS03 on RedHat 9.4? At this point i would switch to RedHat just to be done with the installation. Or am I misunderstanding you? My installation is now stuck at the next step of hdblcm under SLES 15 SP05 as it can not start the hdbnameserver and hdbdaemon due to some errors I don't understand. And it fails "silently" only adding to the trace-Files and retrying in an endless loop.

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Re: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic cal...
entry.content: Is Age dimension part of your model?

entry.title: Re: 1/2 Performance Tuning in SAPUI5
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Lazy loading isn’t limited to tables; you can also lazy load views, fragments or components. For instance, deferring the loading of a view until the user navigates to it can speed up the initial app load. In SAPUI5 routing, you might use asynchronous loading of views or the ComponentContainer with dynamic component loading on demand. The principle is: load heavy content only when needed, keeping the initial payload light."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Unable to see candidates in new pipeline
entry.content:
Hi,

I am unable to see the candidates in new workbench but can see the same candidates in old workbench, tested as applying and forwarding the candidates and the issue is same.

We are observing this behavior post instance refresh, if anyone has faced same, please share your findings.

Thank you,

Manasa.

entry.title: Why is there a reverse explanation of net value and gross value in the SAP system?
entry.content: In standard accounting, the concept of gross value means the raw value without external expenses and taxes, and net value means the gross value plus all expenses and taxes, which is the final value. But in SAP, it has a reverse explanation. Why is that?

entry.title: Re: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic cal...
entry.content: Yes, i have Age dimension in my model

entry.title: Re: SAP BW ANALYSIS
entry.content:
Hello,

Users do not see the latest changes made to the BEx query when they open their locally saved workbooks.
Even after a partial refresh, the changes are not reflected.

How to preserve the cross-tab (Excel) formatting after making changes to the query?

Thinks.

Hocine

entry.title: Re: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic cal...
entry.content: If you don't mind, could you show your model?

entry.title: Re: Access denied to my old blogs
entry.content: You have to link your email to SAP using this link " https://account.sap.com/ " and check if it is linked properly or not. If it is properly linked, your old blog will appear in your SAP account.

entry.title: Re: Sap Service Cloud v1. forward ticket to another e-mai...
entry.content: Unfortunately that won't help. Each team wants to work with their own tickets. People are tracked how many tickets they close per day. If a ticket goes back to another team, it is lost.

entry.title: Re: Delivery Order Draft Query
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP B1 does not store serial numbers in draft documents (Delivery Drafts) the same way it does for posted documents. That’s why you're not seeing serial numbers in your query because they're not saved until the draft is converted to a real Delivery document.

Query:

SELECT
ODRF.DocEntry AS 'Draft Key',
ODRF.DocNum AS 'Draft No',
DRF1.ItemCode AS 'Item Code',
DRF1.Dscription AS 'Item Description',
DRF1.Quantity
FROM
ODRF
INNER JOIN DRF1 ON ODRF.DocEntry = DRF1.DocEntry
WHERE
ODRF.ObjType = '15' -- Only Delivery Drafts
ORDER BY
ODRF.DocEntry, DRF1.LineNum

Regards,
Faraz Maqsud

entry.title: Re: Create Order API SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Ankit,

That's possible but then you should fill the Order API with the relevant fields (it will be considered as synced from ERP). It means for example that you have to fill the BoM and Routing details (including planned dates for operations). It's a little bit tedious but that's, I presume, the only way to use this API.

An example that was working for us (if you create the WC, materials and operations in advance)

{
  "orderNumber": "1234567890",
  "material": "MY_PRODUCT",
  "plant": "MVTS",
  "orderCategory": "PRODUCTION_ORDER",
  "scheduledStart": "2025-05-21T10:00:00.000Z",
  "scheduledEnd": "2025-05-21T15:00:00.000Z",
  "finalDueDate": "2025-05-21T16:00:00.000Z",
  "plannedEnd": "2025-05-21T17:00:00.000Z",
  "plannedStart": "2025-05-21T08:00:00.000Z",
  "plannedQuantityInBaseUnit": 30000,
  "plannedQuantityInProductionUnit": 30000,
  "baseUnit": "KG",
  "baseIsoUnit": "KG",
  "productionUnit": "KG",
  "productionIsoUnit": "KG",
  "erpBomId": "1234567890",
  "bom": {
    "bom": "1234567890",
    "description": "BOM for MY_PRODUCT",
    "components": [
      {
        "componentType": "NORMAL",
        "erpSequence": 10,
        "material": "RAW_MAT_1",
        "sequence": 10,
        "totalQuantityInBaseUnit": 24000,
        "baseUnit": "KG",
        "baseIsoUnit": "KG",
        "assemblyDataType": "",
        "assemblyOperationActivity": {
          "operationActivity": "DOSING",
          "version": "A"
        },
        "backflushEnabled": false
      },{
        "componentType": "NORMAL",
        "erpSequence": 20,
        "material": "RAW_MAT_2",
        "sequence": 20,
        "totalQuantityInBaseUnit": 1200,
        "baseUnit": "L",
        "baseIsoUnit": "L",
        "assemblyDataType": "",
        "assemblyOperationActivity": {
          "operationActivity": "DOSING",
          "version": "A"
        },
        "backflushEnabled": false
      },{
        "componentType": "NORMAL",
        "erpSequence": 30,
        "material": "PACK_MAT_1",
        "sequence": 30,
        "totalQuantityInBaseUnit": 200,
        "baseUnit": "KG",
        "baseIsoUnit": "KG",
        "assemblyDataType": "",
        "assemblyOperationActivity": {
          "operationActivity": "PACKAGING",
          "version": "A"
        },
        "backflushEnabled": false
      }
    ],
    "customValues": []
  },
  "erpRoutingGroup": "1234567890",
  "erpGroupCounter": "1",
  "routing": {
    "entryRoutingStepId": "0010",
    "routing": "1234567890",
    /* routingType:
        PRODUCTION - Production Router;
        SHOP_ORDER - Shop Order-specific Router;
        SPECIAL - Special Operation Router;
        NC - NC (Rework) Router);
        DISPOSITION - Disposition Router (used in disposition groups);
        CONFIGURABLE - Configurable Router Type;
        SERVICE_ORDER_ROUTING - Service Order Router Type.
    */
    "routingType": "SHOP_ORDER",
    "description": "Routing for MY_PRODUCT",
    "quantityValidation": true,
    "automaticGoodsReceipt": true,
    "relaxedFlow": true,
    "customValues": [],
    "routingOperationGroups": [
      {
        "operationNumber": "0010",
        "routingOperationGroup": "DOSING",
        "routingStepIds": ["0010"],
        "description": "Dosing"
      },
      {
        "operationNumber": "0020",
        "routingOperationGroup": "MIXING",
        "routingStepIds": ["0020"],
        "description": "Mixing"
      },
      {
        "operationNumber": "0030",
        "routingOperationGroup": "PRESSING",
        "routingStepIds": ["0030"],
        "description": "Pressing"
      },
      {
        "operationNumber": "0040",
        "routingOperationGroup": "PACKAGING",
        "routingStepIds": ["0040"],
        "description": "Packaging"
      }
    ],
    "routingSteps": [
      {
        "erpSequence": "0",
        "stepId": "0010",
        "workCenter": "DOSING_MACHINE",
        "description": "Dosing Mahcine",
        "reportingStep": "0010",
        "entry": true,
        "lastReportingStep": false,
        "controlKey": "PP03",
        "nextStepIds": [
          "0020"
        ],
        "routingOperation": {
          "operationActivity": {
            "operationActivity": "DOSING",
            "version": "A"
          },
          "weighRelevant": false,
          "automaticGoodsReceipt": false
        },
        "routingStepComponents": [
          {
            "material": "RAW_MAT_1",
            "sequence": 10,
            "quantity": 24000
          },
          {
            "material": "RAW_MAT_2",
            "sequence": 20,
            "quantity": 1200,
            "toleranceUnder": "",
            "toleranceOver": ""
          }
        ] 
      },
      {
        "erpSequence": "0",
        "stepId": "0020",
        "workCenter": "MIXER",
        "description": "Mixer",
        "reportingStep": "0020",
        "entry": false,
        "lastReportingStep": false,
        "controlKey": "PP03",
        "nextStepIds": [
          "0030"
        ],
        "routingOperation": {
          "operationActivity": {
            "operationActivity": "MIXING",
            "version": "A"
          },
          "weighRelevant": false,
          "automaticGoodsReceipt": false
        },
        "routingStepComponents": [] 
      },
      {
        "erpSequence": "0",
        "stepId": "0030",
        "workCenter": "PRESS",
        "description": "Presse",
        "reportingStep": "0030",
        "entry": false,
        "lastReportingStep": false,
        "controlKey": "PP03",
        "nextStepIds": [
          "0040"
        ],
        "routingOperation": {
          "operationActivity": {
            "operationActivity": "PRESSING",
            "version": "A"
          },
          "weighRelevant": false,
          "automaticGoodsReceipt": false
        },
        "routingStepComponents": [] 
      },
      {
        "erpSequence": "0",
        "stepId": "0040",
        "workCenter": "PACKAGER",
        "description": "Packager",
        "reportingStep": "0040",
        "entry": false,
        "lastReportingStep": true,
        "controlKey": "PP03",
        "nextStepIds": [],
        "routingOperation": {
          "operationActivity": {
            "operationActivity": "PACKAGING",
            "version": "A"
          },
          "weighRelevant": false,
          "automaticGoodsReceipt": true
        },
        "routingStepComponents": [
          {
            "material": "PACK_MAT_1",
            "sequence": 30,
            "quantity": 200
          }
        ] 
      }
    ]
  },
  "productionVersion": "PV1",
  "batchNumber": "BATCH25051601",
  "erpOrder": true,
  "erpBomUsage": "1",
  "erpAlternativeBomId": "1",
  "taskListType": "",
  "priority": 500,
  "underdeliveryTolerance": "",
  "minimumDeliveryQuantity": "",
  "overdeliveryTolerance": "",
  "maximumDeliveryQuantity": "",
  "putawayStorageLocation": "",
  "warehouseNumber": "",
  "salesOrder": "",
  "customerId": "",
  "customerName": "",
  "equipmentNumber": "",
  "plannerGroup": "",
  "maintenancePlan": "",
  "personResponsible": "",
  "serialNumbers": [],
  "customValues": [
    {
      "attribute": "REO_PRODUCT_TYPE",
      "value": "S"
    },
    {
      "attribute": "REO_COLOUR",
      "value": "WHITE"
    }
  ],
  "notifications": [],
  "headerText": {
    "language": "EN",
    "mimeType": "1",
    "value": "1234567890"
  },
  "schedules": [
    
    {
      "routingStepId": "0010",
      "earliestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:05:00.000Z",
      "earliestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:15:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:45:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T10:55:00.000Z",
      "earliestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T11:00:00.000Z",
      "latestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:05:00.000Z",
      "latestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:15:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T10:45:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T10:55:00.000Z",
      "latestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T11:00:00.000Z",
      "planSetupTime": 10,
      "planProcessingTime": 30,
      "planTeardownTime": 10,
      "setupTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "setupTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "plannedQuantityInBaseUnit": 30000,
      "minSendAheadQuantity": 0,
      "minSendAheadQuantityUnit": "KG",
      "minSendAheadQuantityIsoUnit": "KG",
      "minOverlapTime": 0,
      "minOverlapTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "minOverlapTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "overlapping": "NO_OVERLAPPING"
    },
    {
      "routingStepId": "0020",
      "earliestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:05:00.000Z",
      "earliestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:15:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:45:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T11:55:00.000Z",
      "earliestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T12:00:00.000Z",
      "latestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:05:00.000Z",
      "latestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:15:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T11:45:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T11:55:00.000Z",
      "latestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T12:00:00.000Z",
      "planSetupTime": 10,
      "planProcessingTime": 30,
      "planTeardownTime": 10,
      "setupTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "setupTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "plannedQuantityInBaseUnit": 30000,
      "minSendAheadQuantity": 0,
      "minSendAheadQuantityUnit": "KG",
      "minSendAheadQuantityIsoUnit": "KG",
      "minOverlapTime": 0,
      "minOverlapTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "minOverlapTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "overlapping": "NO_OVERLAPPING"
    },
    {
      "routingStepId": "0030",
      "earliestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:05:00.000Z",
      "earliestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:15:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:45:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T12:55:00.000Z",
      "earliestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T13:00:00.000Z",
      "latestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:05:00.000Z",
      "latestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:15:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T12:45:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T12:55:00.000Z",
      "latestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T13:00:00.000Z",
      "planSetupTime": 10,
      "planProcessingTime": 30,
      "planTeardownTime": 10,
      "setupTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "setupTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "plannedQuantityInBaseUnit": 30000,
      "minSendAheadQuantity": 0,
      "minSendAheadQuantityUnit": "KG",
      "minSendAheadQuantityIsoUnit": "KG",
      "minOverlapTime": 0,
      "minOverlapTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "minOverlapTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "overlapping": "NO_OVERLAPPING"
    },
    {
      "routingStepId": "0040",
      "earliestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:05:00.000Z",
      "earliestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:15:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:45:00.000Z",
      "earliestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T13:55:00.000Z",
      "earliestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T14:00:00.000Z",
      "latestSetupStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:05:00.000Z",
      "latestProcessingStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:15:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownStartDate": "2025-05-21T13:45:00.000Z",
      "latestTeardownEndDate": "2025-05-21T13:55:00.000Z",
      "latestWaitingEndDate": "2025-05-21T14:00:00.000Z",
      "planSetupTime": 10,
      "planProcessingTime": 30,
      "planTeardownTime": 10,
      "setupTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "setupTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "processingTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "teardownTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "plannedQuantityInBaseUnit": 30000,
      "minSendAheadQuantity": 0,
      "minSendAheadQuantityUnit": "KG",
      "minSendAheadQuantityIsoUnit": "KG",
      "minOverlapTime": 0,
      "minOverlapTimeUnit": "MIN",
      "minOverlapTimeIsoUnit": "MIN",
      "overlapping": "NO_OVERLAPPING"
    }
  ]
}

I hope it helps.

BR,

Emilien

entry.title: Re: How to get SAP Commerce Cloud SOC 1 and SOC 2 Reports
entry.content:
Hello,

You can also check this KBA for details:

How to get the Audit Related SOC report for SAP Commerce Cloud 

Best regards,

Kevin

entry.title: How to upload Classification Characteristic Values to Document Info Record
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

the API Documents | Document Info Record | SAP Business Accelerator Hub  allows the creation of document info records using an OData Service. 

The API also allows the retrieval of the classification of a document info record (" Item node that contains classification values. Only Read operation is supported ")

We currently have an option to create the document info record and upload/link attachments via an API via an connected system. But the maintenance of the of classification of the document and valuation of the characteristics must be done manual in the system. 

Is there also an API to maintain values to a classification characteristic? 

Thank you for the help.

Florian

entry.title: Re: User created view possible in SAP B1 web client UI AP...
entry.content: Hi Nofar, I am also struggling with something similar. It does not like I can add a row\edit cell value in the UDO Line Table. It just does not pickup my guid for the UDO Line Table Columns. Any other samples that shows working with UDO line tables

SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
Hello @sboll,

I tried to install FPS03 on Redhat 9.4, didnt succeeded.

I tried to install FPS02 on Redhat 9.4, I succeeded.

entry.title: Re: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic cal...
entry.content: This is the picture of my model.

entry.title: Re: Auto printing issue while adding marketing documents
entry.content:
• Go to Tools → Print Preferences → Per Document tab

    • Select AR Credit Memo

    • Uncheck "When Adding Document"

    • Do this for both Default and your User ID

  • Go to Administration → Setup → General → Report and Layout Manager

    • Expand AR Credit Memo, select the assigned layout

    • Click Assign Layout

    • Make sure no auto-print rules or custom scripts are applied

  • Go to Tools → Add-on Manager

    • Disable any print-related add-ons (e.g., B1 Print & Delivery)

    • Test the behavior again

  • Go to Administration → System Initialization → Authorizations → General Authorizations

    • Under Document Printing → AR Credit Memo, ensure the user has Full Authorization

  • (Optional) Assign a blank or dummy layout to AR Credit Memo

    • If printing stops, the issue is in the previous layout or its rules

entry.title: Re: Auto printing issue while adding marketing documents
entry.content:
1.I did the first step by gong to print preferences but i am confused when you specified "do this both both default and user".

2.i have checked print and layout manager and i can confirm there is no custom scripts that allow auto printing.

3.There is no add ons.

4.i dont see document printing in authorization(i have attached the screenshot for your reference)

entry.title: Manual exchange rate when clearing 2 open items one in EUR and one in MAD
entry.content:
Hello Experts!!

For a bank GL account managed in MAD (local currency), I need to clear 2 open items : Item 1 with posting date 31122024 in MAD currency, Item 2 with posting date 28022025 in EUR currency. In FBL3N the difference between the two posts is of 0,24 MAD.

Now the business need to clear these two posts with today's date (the system uses today as exchange date), but the difference we have in FBL3N is not the same in F-03 (259 MAD in F-03). Is there a way to allow business use the exchange rate of 28.02.2025 instead of today's date or let them type a manual exchange ?

I tried FIORI app F1579 et F-04 but seem don't cover this need. 022025 period is closed.

Thank you in advance!!!

entry.title: Re: Issue CDN on Workzone Lauchpad with Referenced Fiori...
entry.content:
Hi Dinu, it works deployed on backend and exposed to Workzonde. but * its a mandatory requirement to have this app on BTP, We can not deploy it on backend.

Now i'm a bit lost if its possible to reference this backend  app and use it on my app deployed on BTP cloud running on workzone

Should we deploy also the reference app to BTP ?

IS there any options to stop checking the this resources under  'sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.136.2/resources/' , and tell the app to go to Backend check this ?

entry.title: Re: Activating Unified Data Model for CSB - a complete beginners guide
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest—after adding the Job Location object and running the Rebuild Index job, if we enable UDM, the jobs are not appearing on the RMK page. Could you help identify the possible reason for this behavior?

entry.title: Error List for Production Order Confirmation & A_MaterialDocumentHeader
entry.content:
Hello experts!

A customer wants to differentiate errors in S/4 Public Cloud, so that ALM can send them to different e-mail-addresses. One for technical issues, one for process issues and one general.

For that, we have to check the code which is in the response from S/4 when the Integration Suite tries for example to update an production order.

{
  "code": "RU/494",
  "message": {
    "@lang": "en",
    "$": "Order 1000510 closed"
  }
}

For now we identified the code RU/494, CO/469 & CO/030

The following endpoints are used:

  • API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrder_2
  • API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_MaterialDocumentHeader

Is there a list, where the codes are displayed with the message? I didn't found it on the api hub or business documentation.
Or did I miss it maybe?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Activating Unified Data Model for CSB - a complete beginners guide
entry.content:
Hello,

I would advise opening a support ticket for these cases.

Thanks

entry.title: Is it feasible to connect SuccessFactors to BW/4 HANA via CloudConnector?
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

we're planning to connect BW/4HANA to SuccessFactors. I was wondering if there is an option to connect SuccessFactors to BW/4HANA via CloudConnector? Is this technically possible? 

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it feasible to connect SuccessFactors to BW/4 HANA...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

As described on the Cloud Connector Help Portal, SAP SuccessFactors is not a supported scenario for Cloud Connector connectivity.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Cloud ALM Solution scenario during implementation project
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the approach during an implementation project when new SAP Public Cloud release is coming (in the middle of Realize phase)? We have performed the fit to standard with version 2502 and now new version will be there. Should/can we update the solution scenario and processes somehow or do those remain the ones that were selected originally and its ok? Thanks for help!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements RAP oDataV4: RichTextEditor in ObjectPage
entry.content:
Yeah, it´s not easy, i implemented this here as a sample in @gregorw bookshop sample:

https://github.com/gregorwolf/bookshop-demo/blob/e09433a1a9dff907cfd4cf43da9d91866d158ec9/app/webapp/ordersUI5latest/webapp/ext/fragment/RichTextEditorMacros.fragment.xml#L5

https://github.com/gregorwolf/bookshop-demo/blob/e09433a1a9dff907cfd4cf43da9d91866d158ec9/app/webapp/orders/webapp/ext/ObjectPage.js#L76

entry.title: How to Get Email Alert for Failed Billing Job in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have an automatic job scheduled to create customer invoices (billing documents). We would like to know if there is a way to configure email alerts in case the billing job fails or encounters any errors.

Our goal is to receive notifications promptly so that we can take immediate action without having to manually monitor the job status.

Can someone please guide us on:

  • Whether email notifications for job failures are supported in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • If yes, how can we configure such alerts (e.g., via Manage Automatic Jobs app or any other tool)?
  • Are there any best practices or standard options available for monitoring scheduled billing jobs?

Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,

Mahavir Patil

entry.title: Learning Central Merge user error
entry.content:
While I am trying to merge the user records in Learning Central, I am receiving an error message called "You cannot merge the users because there is an observer relationship for a task checklist between them. To proceed, remove the relationship and try merging again."

So how can I remove observer relationship for a task checklist between them.

entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Iam getting error while creating the repair order through advance return order.

System shows as error data for creating the delivery is incomplete ( supplier )

Why its getting error message in supplier.

Kindly refer the below screen shot. pls support

entry.title: Re: Fetch Destination configuration details from BTP in A...
entry.content:
Hello BishalDeb,

Please refer to the notes in HTTP Communication via Destination Service
  • Static by using the method create_by_cloud_destination in the code (not recommended).
I would recommend to follow the approach as described in Consuming an HTTP Service instead. You can then define custom properties in your communication scenario as described in Service Consumption via Communication Arrangements for any additional properties like API Keys that you need to retrieve.

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Adaptation error in sap mdg ui screen customer
entry.content: Have you find solutions ? Facing same issue 😕

entry.title: Re: Sales order stock determination on the delivery
entry.content: Ok, the solution was, that sales order stock requires special item category where this stock type is explicitly configured. Otherwise it will not find the E stock.

entry.title: Re: Rejected by bank with "back office code is missing" e...

entry.title: Re: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic cal...
entry.content: yes i have shared the picture

entry.title: Re: HR Trigger functionality is not automatically removin...
entry.content: Hi Divyesh, Thank you so much for your thorough effort in compiling all the key points. I truly appreciate your support on this topic. I'll review all the steps you've outlined and will get back to you as soon as possible. Regards, Karunakar

entry.title: I have subaccount administrator role but not able to see/add cloud foundry in subaccount
Re: EAN128 Data matrix Code Scanning with SAP EWM RF Error
entry.content:
Hello Elshall,

 

Have you tried 'closing' the batch data with an FNC1 character?

According to GS1 standards, the batch can contain upto 20 characters (in SAP only 10) but your scanner needs to 'know' when the data ends.

For that an FNC1 character is used.

Link to GS1 site : Standard  and look for application identifier 10 (but that you already know 😉 )

 

Best regards

entry.title: Shaping the Future of SAP data and analytics solutions
entry.content:
Our data and analytics solutions can help you quickly integrate, model, manage, and use data from anywhere. SAP Business Data Cloud is a fully managed SaaS solution that unifies and governs all SAP data and seamlessly connects with third-party data—giving line-of-business leaders context to make even more impactful decisions.

And for developers, SAP HANA Cloud is our leading tool for developing intelligent data applications and extending applications. Finally, Master Data Governance helps you pull together master data and manage it centrally using a master data management layer.

 

With the new projects of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative we offer you the opportunity to influence SAP’s latest innovations when directly working with our developers to define and shape future product directions.

Register until July 25 and take advantage of this opportunity!

 

Enhancing the SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Build Code Experience

SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud (XSC,XSA,CAP)

The Gen AI Assistant in SAP HANA Cloud

Uplift modelling and causality analysis for SAP Analytics  Cloud

 

Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

If you are also interested in other CEI projects that are currently open for registration, see here the full list.

Thank you in advance for your participation!

entry.title: SAP HANA Tenant Database Not Starting – Indexserver Missing
entry.content:
Hell Experts,

We are currently facing an issue with starting the SAP HANA tenant database.

After restarting the HANA system (HDB), the SystemDB started successfully.
However, when we attempt to start the tenant database (HDB), it fails with the following error:

 

general error: Database could not be started; start databaseServer for database=3 on : <hostname>:30203 failed SQLSTATE: HY000

We verified the ports using:

ss -tulpn | grep 302

and noticed that port 30203 (indexserver) is not listening.

Here are the steps we've already tried:

  • Verified and updated the multidb/port_range parameter in global.ini using:

    sql
     
    ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('multidb', 'port_range') = '30041-30999' WITH RECONFIGURE;

  • Stopped and restarted the HANA instance (HDB stop and HDB start).

  • Confirmed that disk, memory, and swap usage are normal.

  • Attempted to start the tenant database again using:

     
     
    ALTER SYSTEM START DATABASE HDB;

    but it returns the same error

  • Found that the indexserver is not starting, and port 30203 remains unused.

 

👉 Request:
Could anyone please help us identify the root cause of why the tenant database is not starting and indexserver is missing?

Your suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated. 🙏

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Visibility disappear from process Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Both are the same things, variables configured in attributes can be used in Visibility scenario.

Francisco Costa

entry.title: Re: How to Get Email Alert for Failed Billing Job in SAP...
entry.content: Check SAP note 3145303. If the help link is not working, raise a ticket to SAP

entry.title: Withholding Tax is calculated on payments and Downpayment Separately
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I hope you’re doing well.

 

We’re encountering an inconsistency in withholding tax calculation:

 

  •  

  • Threshold rule: For amounts up to ₹X→ 0% tax. For amounts above → 10% tax.

  •  

  • The down‑payments from vendors are being taxed separately and not aggregated with full payment amounts.

  •  

  • In contrast, regular invoice payments follow the correct threshold logic.

 

This discrepancy between down‑payments and invoice payments is causing incorrect tax deductions.

 

Could you please advise on:

 

  1.  

  2. Correct configuration for threshold-based tax accumulation across both payment types?

  3.  

  4. Settings or transaction keys to ensure down‑payments and invoices are treated in a single accumulation cycle?

  5.  

  6. Any known workarounds or patches to align the behavior?

 

Your guidance on aligning the issue across both transaction types would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance for your support!

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax is calculated on payments and Downpay...
entry.content:
Please check the Central 'how to' KBA for withholding taxes.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003604569

Which provides the details on formulas, threshhold, accumulation and other configuration related to withholding taxes

entry.title: Re: Transfer historical unbilled revenue to Enteprise pro...
entry.content: Hey Chuma,

entry.title: create own signavio reports in process manager
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need a report that lists for each process the process steps, the responsible person for the step and all documents that are used in this step (we have three customs attributes with different documents) 
There isn't a standard report for that - the question is: how can I create my own report for this topic?

The process manager guide says that it is possible to create own reports but not how to create them. 

Looking forward to your feedback and  thanks in advance! 
Merle

entry.title: Re: Partial Customer Project Invoice Request
entry.content: Sorry Divyesh, but your answer looks like AI generated. There is no such app in SAP ByD as 'Create Billing Request' or 'Manage Sales Orders' and some other things you mentioned.

entry.title: Re: Transfer historical unbilled revenue to Enteprise project
entry.content:
Hey Chuma,

I'm working on enterprise projects in Public cloud , recognition key being used is EPMFC, your suggestion helps a lot ! ,

Just as an after thought , can i use manual contract accruals to achieve the same (report unbilled revenue)

entry.title: Re: How to bind to an existing service without knowing it...
entry.content:
In designtime, I don't think this is possible. Maybe at runtime you can manage to bind a service using the cf api, after finding the service name at startup for example, but I have never tried it so I am not sure. 

What you can do instead is to use mta extension files ".mtaext".
You can have an extension file per space, and write down the name of the service on that space to the file. Your extension file will have a parameter:

parameters:
  aicore_service_name: <service name in that space>

then in your main mta file you will use this parameter: 

  - name: ${aicore_service_name}

Deployment command will be 

cf deploy <file path to the produced mtar file>.mtar -e <space speficif extension file>.mtaext

 

However, I would higly recommend deleting all the services and using one service name for all your deployments.

 

PS: if anyone knows a dynamic way as the OP asks, please show us how to do that.

entry.title: Re: Excel pop-up window not recognized during BPA scenario on virtual machine
entry.content:
We are facing a similar issue. We identified the cause: while attempting to download material-related information from SE16N → MARC, one of the materials contained a special character.

This caused the generated file to become corrupted. Even though the file was downloaded, it could not be opened properly.

After correcting the special character in that material, the file downloaded correctly.

Please check if there are any special characters in the data you're downloading that might not be compatible with Excel formatting.

or try to download the file as .txt and cleaned it later on.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#GDTD导出软件集合导出软件时;提示导出失败
entry.content: 嗯，经过排查是因为数据源被其他CDS引用，非常感谢您的建议

entry.title: Re: Manual exchange rate when clearing 2 open items one i...
entry.content: In F-03, navigate to Settings, Edition Options. Did you try to check the 'Exchange rate from first line item' box.

entry.title: Re: Installation Error S/4 HANA 1909
entry.content: any update this problem, has been solved or no

entry.title: Re: Role design
entry.content:
There is a lot to unpack here. 

If you are re-designing all roles then I presume the client has provided a better understanding of the business processes? Are you going to be working off a defined list of mapped business processes? If not, I would say you should push for this if possible. You also need to make sure you are working to make these roles risk free. 

If you wish to check if a single role is still being used, the only way I see to do this is to track the users' usage. You can use GRC to track the users usage over a period of time. Then you'd need to do some mapping or excel lookup to the usage to the single roles....that's a tricky task. 

Your question regarding the role usage/mapping to modules MM, FI, PO, etc, if the role naming convention allowed you may be able to grab it from there, but other than that you'd need to explore the role contents to check the access and then try and work it out from there.

Assigning plant values to all roles, I am not quite sure I understand this question. Plant values are only required if there is a tcode/fiori app, etc needing this ORG value.

entry.title: Re: How to identify vulnerabilities according to our SAP...
entry.content: You can try looking at Onapsis or Security Bridge for this.

entry.title: Re: Authorization Issue but the user already have the aut...
entry.content: Clear the user buffer.

entry.title: #CoE#GDTD CDS release failed
entry.content: Failed to publish when modifying a CDS view and republishing it

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP : 502 "Error during request to remote service...
entry.content:
@AakashN24 

Please add .env file in the project root with the following parameter:

destinations=[{"name":"<destinationname>","proxyHost":"http://127.0.0.1","proxyPort":"8887","url":"http://<destinationname>.dest"}]

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003112360

entry.title: Re: How to assign roles to Consolidation steps ?
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I just want to add information regarding the questions:

1) Using customizing MDCIMG -> Configure Process Template -> Specify Process Step Authorization Group you can assign different authorization group. The authorization object is responsible for process step permissions. 

2) This is not supported yet in MDG Consolidation Process. 

Best regards,

Sungmin

entry.title: BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M09 confirmation back to CI
entry.content:
Hello community!

We are currently working on an integration with the CI and ERP using the BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M09. We'll be receiving the customer data over the CI and be creating the BP in ERP with the BUPA iDoc. Afterwards we need to send a confirmation back that the BP was created. Is it possible to configurate the BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M09 iDoc to do so, so that we don't have to use the Status idoc ALEAUD01 for instance?

If so, how can I do that? Thanks!

Best,

Cass

entry.title: Re: How to bind to an existing service without knowing it...
entry.content:
If you want to use existing Cloud Foundry service instance wihtout managing its lifecycle via MTA deployment, you need to define it with resource type org.cloudfoundry.existing-service:

  - name: generative-ai-hub
    type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service

(parameters service and service-plan are just ignored)

By default service name is the resource name, in this case generative-ai-hub. But it is possible to define MTA resource parameter service-name. And you can define the service-name in the MTA extension descriptor(s) and provide it/them as deployment specific configuration.

Examples:

In account A, you have the service instance with name my-aicore, so you need similar MTA exntesion descriptor  with sample name account-a.mtaext:

ID: my.mta.a
extends: my.mta

resources:
  - name: generative-ai-hub
    parameters:
      service-name: my-aicore

Then provide the extension descriptor during MTA deployment, e.g. cf deploy <path-to-mtar> -e account-a.mtaext

In account B, you have the service instance with name aicore-prod, so you need similar MTA extension descriptor with sample name account-b.mtaext:

ID: my.mta.b
extends: my.mta

resources:
  - name: generative-ai-hub
    parameters:
      service-name: aicore-prod

Then provide the extension descriptor during MTA deployment, e.g. cf deploy <path-to-mtar> -e account-b.mtaext

This is just example which demonstrate the basic way for overriding/adding parameters into MTA extension descriptors. 

More information:

  • Example for extension descriptors: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cf-mta-examples/tree/main/extension-descriptor-different-environments 
  • Official documentation for handling MTA extension descriptors during MTA deployment into BTP, CF: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/defining-mta-extension-descriptors 
  • Official documentation for MTA resources: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/resources 
  • (if you use Piper) Official way to provide MTA extension descriptors with Piper: https://www.project-piper.io/steps/cloudFoundryDeploy/#mtaextensiondescriptor 
  • (if you use Piper) Official way to generate MTA extension descriptors on the fly with Piper: https://www.project-piper.io/steps/cloudFoundryDeploy/#mtaextensioncredentials

entry.title: Re: HR Trigger functionality is not automatically removin...
entry.content: Hi Divyesh,

entry.title: Re: Account 'KTNAFB : Acc.Dep. Accnt.for Ordinary Dep' co...
entry.content:
Hi Kaveen,

Could you please explain the reason behind maintaining ordinary depreciation account for AuC?
We are having the same error which is solved if we proceed with the proposed configuration but we don' t understand the reason.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,
Marios

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

thanks for this article, I think predictive accounting is really cool. We activated it for sales and procurement (using view FINSV_PR_PUR_PR) in February 2025 in a productive system landscape 🙂

Within the last weeks we discovered that project commitments from 2024 were not shown in predictive accounting.

So we started report FINS_PRED_REPOST for some purchasing documents and requisitions, everything worked fine. After identifying all purchasing documents and requisitions (more than 400 documents), we tried to update with report FINS_PRED_REPOST, which did not work for more than 20 documents.

SAP for Me showes up with note 3433354 which says only that procurement is not being corrected any more and changes the whole report! When implementing the note, only sales documents can be reposted, no more procurement any more 😞 😞

Do you have any updates more information for the procurement side?

Kind regards,

Maria

entry.title: SAP DM - Add individual trigger in Automatic Triggers App
entry.content:
Hi experts,

does anyone of you know if it is possible to add triggers in the Manage Automatic Triggers App in SAP DM? We would like to use the Work Center Download or Work Center Update as a trigger.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Geo Maps with postal codes
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

I need your help creating a Geo Map in the SAC. I have an excel file, which is to be uploaded (example data, so I can show it to you) and it looks the following:

We have the ags (Amtlicher Gemeindeschlüssel), city, postal code (different districts within the city can have different postal codes), county and the federal state. I also added the longitude and latitude, but initially we wanted to use the areas and not the coordinates.

How can I configure the SAC model in a way, that I can investigate the # of cases in regard to the areas? I want to be able to drill down from the federal state all the way to the postal code. But I wasn't able to configure it that way, as I couldn't find a dimensions type like "postal code", only country, region and subregion or longitutde and latitude.  

I'm thankful for any help you can offer, thanks a lot! If you need more information to answer my request, just let me know.

Best regards,
Jan-Nicolas

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Supplier Invoice Reverse without invoice posting access/catalog
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I face the exact same issue. 

Also here we want the user to be able to reversed posted invoices without giving them the access to actually post them...

I struggle with authorization object F_BKPF_KOA...

it has activity "85-Cancel" but even with this button ticked and the option "01- Add or Create" unticked i still cannot reverse the invoice...

BR

Bruno

entry.title: Re: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content:
The BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER will be enhanced by CE2508 as part of the following roadmap item:

Ability to change attributes relevant for tax determination in the “Custom Data Transfer for Billing Documents” BAdI

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BC=6EAE8B27FCC11ED892E9192E318D60CC&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=5D8924BC42191EEFB8DA639C3BC78821

With this enhancement the default billing date is in the importing parameter BIL_DOC-BillingDocumentDate.

In your scenario you can reject item via changing parameter BillingDocumentItemIsRejected. If all items are rejected, the billing document will not be created.

entry.title: Re: Issue Importing Customer Master Data with Multiple Co...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can concatenate all key fields to generate your unique ID in SAC along with keeping all of them as properties.

Such as ID  = customer ID  + sales org  + distr channel + division or

concatenate with "_" like ID = "customer ID" _ "sales org"  _ "distr channel" _ "division" . Concatenate function should be available in import

entry.title: 未找到可用供应商的业务对象
entry.content:
需求：通过代码调用业务对象创建供应商，即 BP 的 FLVN01 FLVN01 角色

BP 的业务对象 i_businesspartnertp_3 中只提供了扩展角色功能，但是没有维护如 公司 和 采购组织层级数据。

单独查找供应商相关业务对象，只找到 I_SUPPLIERLISTTP_2 ，但是已经标记为废弃，是否有其他可用的业务对象，能创建和更新供应商的公司和采购层级数据？

entry.title: Re: Authenticating GitHub Actions Workflows Deploying to the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment with
entry.content:
Thanks, Stefan, for this excellent and timely walkthrough! The use of GitHub-issued short-lived JWTs for authenticating CI/CD workflows with SAP BTP is a big step forward in reducing credential management overhead.

One point I’d like to highlight is the importance of carefully managing the helper user setup. While the approach is secure by design—leveraging scoped JWTs and identity federation—it's essential to ensure that:

  • The helper user has only the minimum required permissions (e.g., Space Developer).
  • Repository access and GitHub Actions execution are tightly controlled.
  • Token mappings are validated and monitored to prevent misuse.

With these safeguards in place, this setup offers a robust and scalable solution for secure automation. Great work!

entry.title: Re: How to bind to an existing service without knowing it...
entry.content: You can create a User Provided Service and bind this to your application. You must configure the UPS in every subaccount.

entry.title: Re: RAP Application Value Help Issue
entry.content:
Hi Andre,
Im also facing the same issue now, will upgrading the sap ui5 version will solve the problem ? 
Release - S4HANA on Premise 2022
UI5 Version - SAP UI5 1.108

entry.title: Re: MDG Consolidation using BP SOA service
entry.content:
Hi Titu,

Just sharing my thoughts

1) How will SOAP webservice trigger the consolidation steps automatically?

-> Please refer to this link on how SOAP will trigger consolidation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/dbc19b55f22d7b43e10000000a4450e5.html 

In the Ch & Cr field you need to basically input the MDC process templates which needs to be triggered by the inbound SOAP service. For Create it has to be consolidation, while for change it has to be mass processing.

2) Is there any external system(any ETL tool) which will have to be deployed here to create the SOA message payload after extracting vendor data from the multiple source systems and publish that SOA payload for MDG/S4 HANA system to consume to trigger MDG Consolidation steps?

-> It depends on the system architecture, for data migration scenario its better to have a middleware to perform data transformation before loading into MDG

3) How will the data extraction take place from multiple source systems in this scenario?  

-> It can happen through custom programs, BODS, SLT etc.

4) Is there any background job to be scheduled at MDG side which will read the SOA payload and trigger the MDG Consolidation steps?

-> Its real time based on bgRFC.

5) In this case, will SOA payload populate all the Consolidation Source tables?

yes they will populate SRC tables as well as PRC tables.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try this plz https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/500292207a261014b467ddb396b66331

You should see set of SAC learning journeys ( including the one you shared)

Some SAP Learning Journeys may require a subscription to the SAP Learning Hub to access full content  including live sessions, assessments or hands-on practice systems etc. Additionally, certain live sessions or events may be organised specifically for SAP partners which may require a partner S-user ID /  an invitation

entry.title: Re: DB Operation SELECT found (BSEG, see Note(s):0002431747) - ATC - S4 readiness
entry.content: It's all detailed in the SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002431747

entry.title: Re: HR Trigger functionality is not automatically removin...
entry.content: Hi Divyesh, As part of the HR trigger configuration, our objective is to automate actions such as user lock, updating the "valid to" date, and role removal. While the configuration is successfully executing user lock and validity updates, it is not removing roles from terminated users as expected. I have gone through the all mentioned steps and below are my answers to. 1. Check BRF+ Rule for HR Trigger Here is our BRF+ decision table condition. When old value A1 change to new value A8 user should be terminated. Ensure the decision table includes the “Remove Roles” action for the termination event. (Where we need to include “remove roles” action in Decision table) 2. Yes, we are maintaining action type “Remove” for termination request. 3. Yes, we are maintaining request “Termination” 4. Maintain Role Removal Criteria Transaction: GRACV_REMOVAL_CRITERIA (T-code does not exists in system, Pl let us know the correct t-code if any) 5. Review Plug-ins and Communication Yes, required Plug-ins are already installed.

entry.title: Re: Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source...
entry.content:
Hi,

See this thread plz, hope it helps

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/acquired-data-model-in-sac-using-hana-cloud-as-a-data-source/qaq-p/13599215

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content:
Hello @maria_ragaller 

Thanks for your message. Unfortunately the report FINS_PRED_REPOST is not longer supported. You may need to create new PO to get the figures updated.

entry.title: Re: CCM - use of Business Volume and Settlement Material
entry.content:
Hello @SD_Jedi ,

We have the similar requirement in our company. My proposal is based on what I did.

Here is my understanding of your business case:
MATNR is set up as a split criteria (Wich will take Invoiced article into settlement document)
But the requirement is only for Delta accrual/settlement - This is correct
For customer settlement (manual & automatic) - settlement material from contract should be considered.

Proposed solution:
For Automatic settlement:
We want different behavour in different settlement process - there is no standard configuration to support this. We have to use SAP Provided enhancement/BAdI to solve the business case.
For this I have used BAdI WB2_CC_SETTL_CHANGE_PARAM
You can delete MATNR from split criteria when the use case is not delta accrual.
e.g. when "cv_use_case ne cl_wzre_con=>co_use_case_type-contract_settlement_delta_accr "
Explanation: As per standard, settlement material from contract is taken by default, when MATNR is not passed or in case of No Business volume base.
What we are doing here is exactly that, we are not passing MATNR so that, settlement material from condition contract will be considered by default.

For Manual Settlement:
We have much more complex requirement and we are using BAPI simulation to also propose tobe paid. Therefore one solution works for both automatic and manual.
However, please check BAdI: WB2_CC_MAN_DOC_ENTRY --> Method CHANGE_BEFORE_BEFORE_ENTRY
You can derive CT_KOMLFP from IS_KOMWCOCOH.

Hope this helps.
All the best,
Aniruddha

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content: Still the link does not show the lesson contents.

entry.title: No data in Cloud SAPS4 HANA
entry.content:
We have provisioned the SAP S4 PERSON_NAME Cloud environment but that's blank fully and we are unable to use it. Kindly help us with sample data in it so that we can use the instance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-analytics-cloud?url_id=text-gl-hp

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content:
Hi,

In case I want to create a customer Responsibility Rule of type SITU, I am unfortunately unable to perform all the steps. I have created a BAdI and linked a custom Responsibility Context to it. When I want to create a custom Responsibility Rule I want to add the Agent Rule by adding my Responsibility Rule ID. When I add that, I get the error that I need to add a data source and the linked field, but the pop-up for the data source does not contain any data sources. Any idea on how to fix it?

entry.title: Re: No data in Cloud SAPS4 HANA
entry.content:
To get the sample data from the Migration Cockpit please refer to the below KBA,

2470789 - SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit (Cloud) - Sample data migration templates

 

Thanks and Regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content: I am trying with a valid Learning Hub user login, but still this site appears to be behind a secured area !!!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Mumali,

I have not yet had time to test this. However, have you checked that this error actually prevents you from working with "gCTS"?  This is a new check, which may not be relevant for the free ABAP Cloud Developer Trial.

Please let me know how you get on,

Thanks and best wishes,

Julie Plummer.
